draftPayload.title: Wireless TWS Stereo Earbuds
draftPayload.descriptionHtml:
*Features*:

  • Deliver crisp clear stereo sound
    • Easily pair with universal wireless-enabled device like smartphone,tablet,iPhone,iPad,laptop Built-in noise-reducing microphone One button answering/hanging up/rejecting hands-free calls and redialing the last number dialed
  • Automatic voice prompt including incoming phone number report
  • Each of the earbuds can be used alone with full functionality
  • Share your favorite tunes with friend anytime anywhere by sharing the earbuds
  • Lightweight,snug and comfortable design
  • Includes a charging pod for convenient charging and storage
  • CE and RoHS certified

*Specifications*:

  • Earbuds:
  • Wireless Version: V4.2+EDR
  • Protocols Supported: HSP, HFP, A2DP, AVRCP
  • Transmission Range: ≤12M/39ft
  • Driver Unit: Ф7mm
  • Impedance: 32ohm±15%
  • Talk Time: (One Earbud): 5-6 hours; (Two Earbuds): 4-5 hours
  • Play Time: (One Earbud): 5-6 hours; (Two Earbuds): 4-5 hours
  • Standby: (One Earbud): 120 hours; (Two Earbuds): 70 hours
  • Charge Time: 1-2 hours
  • Battery: built-in 3.7V 75mAh li-ion battery per earbud
  • Size(per earbud): 0.94” x 0.71” x 1.1”/2.4 x 1.8 x 2.8cm (L x W x H)
  • Weight(per earbud): 5g/0.17oz
  • Available Color: black, white
  • Charging Pod:
  • Battery: built-in 3.7V 950mAh li-ion battery
  • Charging Voltage: DC 5V
  • Size of Charging Pod: 3.27” x 1.5” x 1.3”/8.3 x 3.8 x 3.3cm (L x W x H)
  • Weight of Charging Pod: 42g/1.48oz
  • Package size: 3.74” x 1.57” x 6.1”/9.5 x 4 x 15.5cm (L x W x H)
  • Package weight: 165g/0.36lbs

*Package Lists*:

  • 1 × Pair of Wireless Stereo TWS Earbuds
  • 2 × Pair of Replacement Eartips
  • 1 × USB Charging Cable
  • 1 × User Manual

draftPayload.title: Earbuds wireless bluetooth headset
draftPayload.descriptionHtml:
Bluetooth protocol: 5.0

Channel: stereo
How to use: Earplug type
Single and double ears: bilateral three-dimensional


description:

1. English voice prompt.
2. Send out the phone number.
3. Visualize the functions of the IOS system.
4. Answer/reject the call.
5. Redial the last number.
6. HD voice quality.
7. Solution: high-end solution.
8. Compatibility mode: compatible with all versions of Bluetooth.
9. Signal transmission channel: Cassl2.
10. Usage: Semi-in-ear style.
11. Microphone sensitivity: -42DB high-end transmitter.
12. The longest transmission distance: 10-15 meters.
